productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Joanna Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves sleeves with single button contrasting cuffs, a contrasting spread collar, buttoned placket, branding above the hem and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from arrow, with its crush-worthy hue is designed with an easy, drapey silhouette that enhances your curves. Pair it with a pencil skirt, close toe pumps and a scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
